item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-042","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly gates the irreversible action of dissolving QA, while preserving the main premise that AI testing should be adopted and will improve. It downgrades the proposal to an AI-augmented QA transition, assigns QA to risk/quality judgment, and gives pilot metrics such as defect escape rate, test cycle, and automation coverage as conditions for future staffing decisions rather than simply taking a pro/anti-AI stance."}
